response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, cloud infrastructure, and optimization, his background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile applications and general software engineering rather than the specialized domain of AI accelerator hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload analysis. His resume does not highlight relevant experience in performance bottleneck analysis for AI workloads, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design, which are critical for this role. His educational background (BS in Computer Science) does not meet the minimum degree requirement for the principal-level position, and his technical stack (e.g., TypeScript, React, Node.js) does not align closely with the required skills.
strengths: Strong background in software development across multiple languages and platforms (JavaScript/TypeScript, C/C++, D, Java, etc.)
Experience with performance optimization in low-latency systems (e.g., real-time metadata handling at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq)
concerns: Lacks direct experience in AI accelerator hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload analysis
No evidence of GPU architecture or SIMD/MIMD experience, which are preferred qualifications
Educational background (Bachelor's degree) does not meet the minimum requirement for the principal-level role

key_factors.factor: Lack of domain-specific experience (AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning workloads)
Educational qualifications (Bachelor's degree) below the required threshold for principal-level role
Strong general software engineering skills but not aligned with the core technical requirements
